summary: 2/2 goals MET. Key deltas: pgvector Rust crate resolves to 0.4.x (not 0.7 as spec'd — Rust crate and Postgres extension versioning are independent axes); PgVectorRpc row serializer uses text format for all column types (numbers/booleans come back as strings — acceptable for Phase 5 unblocking, needs typed deserialization before production SDK ships). No blocking debt. Recommended next: p3-graphql-hybrid-engine, after confirming OQ-3 resolved.
scope_deltas: pgvector Rust crate version is 0.4.2, not 0.7 (independent versioning axis from Postgres extension 0.7.4)
PgVectorRpc row serializer uses text format — non-string columns serialize as Postgres text representation
filter field in VectorRpcRequest accepted but not yet applied to WHERE clause
pre_kickoff_gate: OQ-3 must be confirmed resolved (pg_graphql PG18) before p3-c001
